professional_summary: Digital marketing and growth professional with 6 years of experience driving demand generation, SEO, and paid acquisition for B2B SaaS companies. Proven track record of scaling pipeline through content marketing, email campaigns, and performance marketing with measurable ROI using Google Analytics, HubSpot, and Marketo.

work_experience.title: Senior Growth Marketing Manager
bullets: Led demand generation strategy generating $4.2M in qualified pipeline through integrated SEO, SEM, and email marketing campaigns
Managed $800K annual Google Ads and Facebook Ads budget, achieving 3.2x ROAS through continuous A/B testing and CRO
Built HubSpot marketing automation workflows reducing lead response time from 4 hours to 12 minutes, increasing conversion rate by 28%
Grew organic traffic by 180% in 18 months through content marketing strategy and technical SEO improvements
Launched 6 product campaigns from go-to-market planning through execution, each achieving target MQL goals

work_experience.title: Digital Marketing Manager
bullets: Managed end-to-end email marketing program with Marketo and Mailchimp serving 120,000+ subscriber list
Implemented attribution modeling in Google Analytics reducing wasted ad spend by $200K annually
Executed inbound marketing strategy with Salesforce integration, increasing MQL-to-SQL conversion by 35%
Created and optimized Google Tag Manager tracking setup for complete marketing funnel visibility

work_experience.title: Marketing Coordinator
bullets: Managed social media management across LinkedIn, Twitter, and Instagram growing combined following by 45%
Wrote copywriting for landing pages, case studies, and blog content achieving average 4.2% conversion rate
Ran competitive analysis and market research reports used by executive team for quarterly strategy planning
Supported demand generation campaigns using HubSpot, driving 500+ monthly leads through paid social and PPC

projects.name: GrowthPlaybook.co
projects.description: Community resource for B2B growth marketers with 2,000+ members sharing campaign templates and benchmarks
